node.statement: FRAME POTENTIAL: ΔF^(α) = F^(α)/F^(α)_Haar - 1 where F^(α) = E_{ψ,ψ'}[|⟨ψ'|ψ⟩|^{2α}] and F^(α)_Haar = D^{-2α}·α!. For noiseless brickwall circuits: ΔF^(α)/N ∝ e^{-2t/τ}. This matches Setup I corrections (domain walls in the design-time problem). [Eqs.(29-30), Fig.6, main.tex lines 416-427]
